hero.title:
Discord Bot
for Your Dream Server
hero.subtitle: Synapse comes with advanced AI Chat, elegant welcome system, and modern admin dashboard — all in one bot.
features.label: Key Features
features.title:
Everything you need,
right here.
features.subtitle: From entertainment to server management — Synapse is ready to be the backbone of your community.
features.ai.title: Advanced AI Chat
features.ai.desc: Powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash, OpenRouter, and Groq. Choose bot personality: friendly, formal, tsundere, or wise — fitting your server's character.
features.welcome.title: Elegant Welcome System
features.welcome.desc: Fully customizable welcome banners: member avatar, text, colors, background, embed — all through a visual dashboard.
features.dashboard.title: Modern Admin Dashboard
features.dashboard.desc: Manage all server settings from your browser. Real-time stats, dark mode, mobile responsive — no coding required.
features.donation.title: Donation & Boost Tracker
features.donation.desc: Automatically track donations and server boosts. Send custom thank-you messages and view complete statistics from the dashboard.
features.autoresponder.title: Auto Responder & Actions
features.autoresponder.desc: Create auto-reply rules, keyword triggers, and automated actions. Streamline moderation without extra bots.
steps.label: How It Works
steps.title: Get started in 3 steps
steps.subtitle: No complicated setup. Invite, login, and configure however you want.
steps.invite.title: Invite Bot
steps.invite.desc: Click "Add to Server" and pick your Discord server. It only takes a few seconds.
steps.login.title: Login to Dashboard
steps.login.desc: Login with your Discord account. Only admins or server managers can access settings.
steps.setup.title: Configure & Enjoy
steps.setup.desc: Customize features to fit your server needs from an intuitive dashboard. All changes take effect instantly.
cta.title:
Ready to take your server
to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of servers already using Synapse. Free, easy, and ready to go.
faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Synapse below.
faq.a1: Yes, Synapse is completely free to use. All main features like AI chat, welcome system, and admin dashboard are available at no cost. We may add premium features in the future, but the free version will remain powerful and complete.
faq.q2: How do I invite this bot to my server?
faq.a2: It's easy! Click the "Add to Server" or "Invite Bot" button in the navbar, then select your Discord server and grant the required permissions. The bot will be active within seconds. Make sure you have Manage Server permission on that server.
faq.q3: Is the AI Chat feature safe and privacy-friendly?
faq.a3: Very safe. We do not store private conversation history permanently. AI Chat uses advanced models (Gemini AI, OpenRouter, Groq) with built-in security filters. You can also configure the bot's personality and limit which channels can use the AI feature.
faq.q4: How do I set up the welcome banner (welcome system)?
faq.a4: Login to the Dashboard, select your server, then go to the Welcome System menu. There you can customize: background banner, text color, avatar position, custom message, target channel, and embed styling — all without coding. Changes go live instantly in real-time.
commands.desc.ai_personality: Change AI personality (friendly, formal, tsundere, wise)
commands.desc.kick: Remove a member from the server
commands.desc.ban: Ban a member from the server
commands.desc.warn: Give a warning to a member
commands.desc.clear: Bulk delete messages in a channel
commands.desc.donasi: Record a donation to the database
commands.label: Command List
commands.title: Commands Reference
commands.subtitle: Explore all available commands in Synapse.
about.label: About Us
about.title: About Synapse
about.subtitle: Get to know the versatile Discord bot ready to help your community.
about.vision.title: 🎯 Vision
about.vision.desc: Synapse was built with the vision of becoming the backbone of Discord communities — providing one versatile bot that combines quality entertainment, artificial intelligence, elegant server management, and a seamless user experience. We believe every Discord server deserves a powerful bot without having to pay or compromise on quality.
about.dev.title: 👤 Developer
about.dev.desc: Developed by an enthusiast passionate about automation and online communities. With experience in the Discord ecosystem and modern technology, Synapse is designed to be scalable, reliable, and easily customizable by anyone — no programming skills required.
about.tech.title: 🛠️ Tech Stack
